'''LifeLine Technologies''' was a company that manufactured various [[Environment suit/Legends|enviro-suits]] and protective gear for the crews of [[Starship/Legends|starships]].Their range of products included the [[Model 11 Space Suit]],<ref name="RPG2RE" /> the [[Immediac Model 10 spacesuit]],<ref name="MFOWM" /> and the [[TechMaster II Vacuum Suit|TechMaster II vacuum suit]].<ref name="PSG" />

{{Company-stub}}
